title: China’s PBOC Adds Gold Again as Bullion Remains Under Pressure
description: China’s central bank extended its gold-buying streak in May, adding to holdings as prices of the precious metal remained under pressure.

title: Malaysian Police Finish Probe Into Ex Anti-Graft Chief, NST Says
description: Malaysian police have completed a probe into two cases involving former anti-graft chief Azam Baki and referred the matter to the Attorney-General’s Chambers, according to the New Straits Times.

title: World’s Hottest Market Has Korea Bulls Reaching for Protection
description: A wave of optimism over South Korean stocks is giving way to growing caution, as some investors hedge positions and pare back crowded trades on concerns that the rally has run too hot, too fast.

title: Can the N.F.L. Win Fans in South Korea With Flag Football?
description: The inclusion of flag football in the next Olympic Games has spurred optimism about the prospects of American football in South Korea, where it has languished for decades.

title: Member of Neo-Nazi Party Reaches Mayoral Runoff in German Town
description: Since the fall of the Third Reich, German voters have shunned mayoral candidates from neo-Nazi parties. That could change on Sunday in a small town in the country’s east.

title: Why is Chinese President Xi Jinping visiting North Korea now?
description: The Chinese leader is making his first trip to Pyongyang in seven years amid significant military developments.

title: Kenyan graduates turn to AI tools for farming as jobs dry up
description: Young farmers are combining traditional agriculture with mobile apps to build livelihoods in the absence of formal jobs.

title: Protests grow in Albania against Trump-Kushner-linked resort
description: Thousands of protesters have rallied in the Albanian capital against a proposed luxury beach resort linked to Trump.

title: Iran war live: Israel kills Lebanon general, Pakistan urges end to war
description: Israeli forces kill three high-ranking Lebanese soldiers as Arab nations condemn Iran's attacks on Bahrain and Kuwait.

title: Park life: why China’s malls are building forests, waterfalls and sky walkways
description: Property developers are focusing on building shopping centres featuring lush greenery, gardens and water features in mainland China, as such spaces have become more attractive to shoppers and retailers than conventional high-density malls. “Consumers increasingly view retail destinations as places to spend time rather than simply places to buy products. This reflects the continued growth of online retail as well as changing lifestyle preferences,” said James Macdonald, head of research for China...

title: Why can’t investors buy the mainland’s hottest AI stocks via Stock Connect?
description: Since 2014, the Stock Connect scheme has become a major channel for Hong Kong and international investors to buy stocks on the Chinese mainland. But cross-border traders have grown frustrated in recent months, as they have been unable to access a wave of blockbuster listings by AI companies on the mainland. Likewise, mainland investors could not take advantage of a string of recent initial public offerings by artificial intelligence firms in Hong Kong. Here, we explain why Stock Connect does not...

title: ‘It’s the wealth effect’: Hong Kong luxury malls thrive amid IPO gains, housing recovery
description: Hong Kong’s new status as the world’s top cross-border wealth hub, overtaking Switzerland, alongside a recovering local housing market and strong initial public offerings (IPOs), is translating into a boom for high-end malls, with landlords enjoying improved revenues and rents. Hard luxury and jewellery segments have posted consecutive months of robust growth, though the era of traditional high-street dominance has ended. Industry experts said the market was increasingly defined by targeted...

title: Hegseth attacks Europe over migration with beach 'invasion' D-Day speech
description: The US defence secretary was speaking in Normandy, 82 years after allied forces launched their operation to liberate Nazi-occupied north-western Europe.

description: The two men became president and prime minister by defeating the political old guard in Senegal. Now they are fighting each other.

title: Trump’s Defense Department Sees Growing Espionage Threat From Israel
description: The Defense Department has increased the counterintelligence threat assessment to its highest level, and Israel is believed to have eavesdropped on American negotiations with Iran.

title: Sorry, I’m Not Available. Talk to the A.I. Version of Me.
description: The hot new productivity hack for C.E.O.s and Harvard professors? A.I. twins that answer questions and attend meetings.
